name: requirements_validation
purpose: Validate requirement artifacts for clarity, completeness, ambiguity, and readiness for design
rules: Detect and flag solution leakage in requirements (technology/vendor choices, API/table design, framework-level prescriptions) unless explicitly mandated by source constraints
Detect and flag mechanical/storage-oriented canonical business names (for example Entry, Row, Log Table) and recommend business-first names with explicit scope
Prefer requirement phrasing that states business intent, expected outcome, constraints, and verifiable acceptance conditions
Ensure each requirement has an ID and acceptance criteria where applicable
